items.claim: Conor McGregor is unlikely to control Max Holloway with grappling for 25 minutes.
items.quote: the most least likely thing that I see in this fight is Conor McGregor coming out here and controlling Max Holloway with grappling for 25 minutes.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has been away from competition for five years.
items.quote: Conor's been away for five years.

items.claim: Max Holloway has improved his defensive footwork and elusiveness since his first fight with McGregor.
items.quote: Max has gotten a lot better defensively with the footwork, the elusiveness

items.claim: Fighting at 170 lbs favors Conor McGregor due to his previous experience in that weight class.
items.quote: it's 170 lbs. And I believe that to a degree that favors Connor.

items.claim: Max Holloway is more vulnerable now than he was a few years ago due to the damage he has absorbed.
items.quote: I do think that Holloway is more vulnerable than he was a few years ago. He's taken a ton of damage

items.claim: Max Holloway's primary path to victory is attacking McGregor's lead leg to compromise his base.
items.quote: I think Max Holloway's biggest weapons in this fight are going to be attacking the lead leg of McGregor

items.claim: Conor McGregor will suffer a significant adrenaline dump due to his long layoff.
items.quote: I think that he's going to suffer a big adrenaline dump.

items.claim: Moving up to 170 lbs may negatively impact Max Holloway's speed and cardio.
items.quote: I also think it's possible that that slows down Max. It makes his gas tank a little bit worse
